title: Lampranthus glaucoides

This classification is due to its unique characteristics and growth habits, which are similar to those of other plants within this family. The genus Lampranthus is part of the tribe Ruschieae, a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. Lampranthus glaucoides is further classified into the subgenus Lampranthus.
